name: work-workflow
description: Deterministic workflow orchestrator for Jira task implementation with state machine validation.

scripts.test: node --test workflows/lib/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/work/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/check/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/check/agents/pr-reviewer/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/work-pr/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/work-pr/agents/pr-generator/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/work-implement/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/lib/scripts/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/work/scripts/__tests__/*.test.js workflows/work/agents/commit-writer/*.spec.js
scripts.dev:check: pnpm dev:lint && pnpm dev:typecheck && pnpm dev:test
